parameters.subject: =You missed it – here's the replay (expires in 7 days)
parameters.message:
==

We saved your spot 🎬

Hi {{$json.name ? $json.name.split(" ")[0] : "there"}},

Life gets busy – we completely understand. The good news is that {{$json.event_name}} was recorded and you have 7 days to watch it.

Watch the Replay →

The session covers:

  • How to automate webinar follow-ups end-to-end
  • Using free AI tools for lead scoring
  • Real n8n workflow walkthrough (copy-paste ready)

No pressure. If you have questions after watching, just reply here.

parameters.text:
=Write a complete replay distribution email package for this webinar.

Webinar details:
- Name: {{ $('If').item.json.name }}
- Date: {{ $('If').item.json.event_date }}
- Total duration: {{ $('If').item.json.event_duration_minutes }} minutes
- Topic area: AI automation for business workflows

Return ONLY this JSON:
{
  "email_subject": "compelling subject line under 60 characters, create curiosity",
  "preview_text": "email preview text under 90 characters",
  "headline": "short punchy headline, 5-8 words",
  "summary_paragraph": "2-3 sentences: what was covered, why it matters, what viewer will learn",
  "top_3_takeaways": [
    "concrete actionable takeaway 1",
    "concrete actionable takeaway 2",
    "concrete actionable takeaway 3"
  ],
  "cta_text": "call to action button text, 2-4 words",
  "ps_line": "compelling P.S. line that creates 7-day urgency for the replay link"
}
